app.title: Travel Agent Helper
app.subtitle: Search suppliers, cancellation fees, transfers, baggage and hotels

ai.title: AI Quote Assistant
ai.apiKeyDescription: Paste your own Anthropic key to unlock the assistant. It's encrypted at rest and used only for your requests — all token costs are on your account.
ai.apiKeyHint: Starts with sk-ant-. Only the last 4 characters are kept, for display.
ai.deleteDescription: You'll need to paste a key again to use the assistant.
ai.demoNote: Demo mode: no AI backend is configured, so the key isn't sent anywhere — it just unlocks the UI.
ai.readyDescription: Your key is set. Open the assistant to start creating quotes.
ai.errInvalidKey: That API key is invalid. Check it and try again.
ai.errRateLimited: You've hit your provider's rate limit — try again shortly.
ai.errBackend: Couldn't reach the AI service. Try again.
ai.noSavedQuotes: No saved quotes yet. Generate a quote above and click “Save to history”.
ai.deleteQuoteDescription: This permanently removes the saved quote.
ai.emptyHint: Paste an offer or attach a screenshot of a hotel deal — I'll extract the details and draft a quote you can forward.
ai.errChat401: Your API key is invalid — update it in settings.
ai.errChatGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ai.greetingTitle: What can I quote for you today?
ai.greetingSubtitle: Paste an offer or attach a screenshot of a hotel deal — I'll extract the details and draft a client-ready quote you can forward.
ai.enterHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line
ai.exchangeRateHint: Add a rate per currency. The assistant will use them for conversions in your next messages.
ai.suggestExtractPrompt: Extract the hotel offer from this screenshot and build a client-ready quote.
ai.suggestWhatsappPrompt: Draft a WhatsApp quote for a 7-night all-inclusive package in Batumi for 2 adults.
ai.suggestConvertPrompt: Turn this supplier price into a client-ready quote with my markup added.

news.intro: Tourism articles from external news sites. Headlines link to the source — click to read the full story on the publisher's website.
news.empty: 😕 No articles right now. Please try again later.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Enter your username and password.
auth.registerSubtitle: Enter your invite code and choose a username.
auth.usersSubtitle: Change roles or remove users. You can't change your own role.
auth.passwordUpdated: Password updated — other devices were signed out.
auth.twoFactorHint: Add a second step at sign-in using an authenticator app.
auth.setupScan: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, …), or enter the key manually:
auth.backupCodesHint: Save these somewhere safe — each works once if you can't use your authenticator.
auth.regenerated: New backup codes generated — the old ones no longer work.
auth.disableHint: Enter a current code or your password to turn off 2FA.
auth.mfaHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app (or a backup code).
auth.errInvalidCode: That code isn't valid. Try again.
auth.errMfaExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.logoutAllConfirm: Sign out of all devices, including this one?
auth.connectedHint: Link a provider for one-click sign-in.
auth.errLocked: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
auth.errCodeInvalid: This invite code is invalid, used or expired.
auth.errUsernameShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
auth.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errForbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
auth.invitesSubtitle: Create single-use codes; share one so someone can register with that role.

account.deleteHint: Permanently delete your account and sign out everywhere.
account.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete your account? This can't be undone.
account.lastAdminNote: You're the last admin — assign another admin before deleting your account.
account.auditSubtitle: Recent privileged actions across the app.

contact.title: Contact — {name}
contact.subtitle: Supplier contact details
contact.name: Name
contact.empty: No contact details yet — click "Edit" to add.

transfers.intro: Hotel transfers (both ways) are included in vacation packages only. For flight-only bookings and organized tours, transfers are not relevant to this table.
transfers.searchPlaceholder: Search a destination or country... (Hebrew or English)

baggage.intro:
🎒 Backpack: All airlines up to 4 kg

💼 Trolley: Most airlines up to 8 kg

🧳 Luggage: Unlisted airlines up to 20 kg
baggage.commissionNote: The commission applies to the base fare only — taxes excluded.

cancellations.intro: Supplier cancellation fees are net (supplier cost only). The "client" section keeps a 10% gross margin on the booking + the Consumer Protection Law.
cancellations.copyTitle: Cancellation Fee for Client (Keep of 10% Gross Margin + Consumer Protection Law)
cancellations.law: Up to 14 calendar days from booking, provided there are at least 7 business days before departure — a cancellation fee of ₪100 per traveler or 5% of the transaction price — whichever is lower.

hotels.emptyHint: Pick a destination to see its hotels. Type a destination name, country or airport code — e.g. Batumi, Athens, Sofia or BUH.

modal.updateManually: ✏️ To update room details — enter them manually in the system
